chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1863 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on M.A. 7106//2022 For orders on office objection For orders on M.A. 9194/2021 For hearing of main case 26.05.2022 Mr. Aijaz Ahmed Chandio, advocate for petitioner. --- This petition seeks restoration of petitioner’s service. He was essentially dismissed in the year 1989 on account of some criminal prosecution. The case proceeded and the accused was released u/s 249 Cr.P.C. for want of evidence. Now, after almost delay of 11 years petitioner has filed this petition for his reinduction / restoration in the shape of reinstatement. This petition seriously suffers from laches and when inquired petitioner’s counsel on instructions submits that he would not press this petition. Petition is accordingly dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE
